_comment: Single source of truth for the auto-generated README + SVG infographics. Edit this file and the generator, not the rendered output. Public-safe only: no surname, employer name, secrets, private URLs, revenue, or internal strategy.
currently: Scaling **ParentPod** — live on iOS & Android; running growth experiments against fixed survival checkpoints.
**Longevity** on deck — a privacy-first wellness companion, hardening for launch.
Evolving the **agent-automation platform** — parallel fan-out, an adversarial review pass, and doc-freshness gates.

pipeline.detail: Intent → a scoped PLAN.md, bounded by standards-as-code loaded into every agent
Agents fan out in parallel, test-first, each in an isolated worktree
Adversarial review pass + tests + typecheck + lint + security & doc-freshness gates
Auto-merge on green → deploy → health check → docs and changelog updated

platform.summary: A standards-as-code library plus an agent-orchestration layer turns intent into reviewed, tested, deployed changes across every repo — parallel fan-out, an adversarial review pass, and a doc-freshness gate before merge.

commands.name: ship
commands.does: release gate — version, build, test, deploy, auto-merge, doc-freshness

commands.name: audit
commands.does: security, dependency, dead-code, a11y & perf sweep

commands.name: new-project
commands.does: scaffold a repo with standards, CI, secrets, context primer

commands.name: update-brain
commands.does: maintain the knowledge base and reconcile the task hub

commands.name: improve
commands.does: fold a sharper prompt back into a skill so it compounds

practices: **TypeScript strict** everywhere; Zod validates every external boundary; impossible states made unrepresentable.
**Test the behavior and the failure path** — a bugfix starts with a failing test that reproduces it.
**Secrets only from Doppler** — never in code or git history; only public keys ship in client bundles.
**AuthZ server-side** on every privileged path — enforced in Firestore rules / Supabase RLS, not just app code.
**Tiered CI** (active / dabble / parked) keeps Actions minutes low; CLI-first deploys through the release gate.
**Conflicts never handed back** — mechanical ones auto-resolved, real ones resolved and proven green with tests.
**Accessibility & cross-platform** — semantic markup, keyboard paths, and Capacitor guards for native builds.

projects.name: ParentPod
projects.tagline: The village operating system for modern parenting teams.
projects.blurb: One real-time timeline for co-parents, grandparents, and nannies — log feeds, sleep, diapers, meds, and growth by voice, with AI insights, without adding to the mental load.
highlights: Live on the App Store and Google Play; offline-first Capacitor build
Firestore rules enforce multi-caregiver access server-side; native IAP via RevenueCat

deepdive.Problem: Caring for a baby is a team sport, but the tools assume one logged-in parent — state fragments across people and devices.
deepdive.Architecture: React + Vite in a Capacitor shell (one codebase → iOS, Android, Web). Firestore for real-time multi-caregiver sync; security rules enforce role-scoped access server-side; RevenueCat for cross-platform subscriptions; voice logging and AI insight summaries.
deepdive.Engineering: Offline-first with optimistic writes and conflict-safe merges; the same automated release gate ships web (Vercel) and native (App Store / Play) from one push.

projects.name: Longevity
projects.blurb: A habit and wellness companion — streaks, daily check-ins, and progress insights across ten dimensions of health.
highlights: Next.js + Capacitor; accessible Radix UI; Sentry-instrumented, hardened CSP

projects.name: RealInvestorX
projects.blurb: Underwrite, compare, and semantically search property deals in a Turborepo monorepo backed by Postgres + pgvector.
highlights: Turborepo monorepo; Supabase Postgres + pgvector for semantic deal search
In-flight: HttpOnly-cookie session cutover off client-side token storage

projects.name: Apex
projects.blurb: Import, categorize, and chart cash flow and net worth — with Monte Carlo retirement simulations.
highlights: React + Vite on Supabase (Postgres + row-level security); spreadsheet-style importer + Monte Carlo engine

projects.name: Compliance OS
projects.blurb: Map policies to controls to evidence, with AI-assisted mapping and role-based review workflows.
highlights: Full-stack evidence management with rich-text authoring; role-based review workflows

projects.name: Beyond Volatility
projects.tagline: The hub — the front door to the portfolio.
projects.blurb: Public hub and blog that indexes every product, plus a suite of free interactive financial and lifestyle tools.
highlights: Custom child theme; the canonical public index of every product, with 15+ interactive calculators

waka._note: Flip enabled=true after: (1) create a WakaTime account, (2) install the editor plugin, (3) enable 'Display code time publicly' and 'Display languages publicly' in WakaTime → Settings. Then set username and rerun the generator.
